name: G Mining Ventures Corp.
description: G Mining Ventures Corp. is a mining company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of precious metal projects. Its flagship asset is the Tocantinzinho Gold Project, located in the Pará State of Brazil, which is currently under construction and moving toward commercial production. Led by an experienced management team with a strong track record in mine construction and operations, the company aims to build a multi-asset intermediate gold producer by leveraging its internal expertise to deliver projects on time and on budget.
